reason: Environment broken (cannot achieve gold=1 even with solve.sh applied): test_repo_import_utils and test_repo_get_tokenizer_import fail due to missing tqdm; test_repo_tokenizer_unit_tests fails due to missing transformers. These are Docker environment issues. Additionally, solution_uniqueness_guard fails because tests use _extract_source_range with hardcoded identifiers - naming those identifiers (needed for behavior_in_task_description) triggers no_solution_leakage. instruction.md cannot be reconciled without breaking the oracle.
